label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 4

extraction.one_line_summary: JACOBSEN Fabio won from behind a DÉMARE screen after PHILIPSEN was boxed out in technical finale compression.
tactical_patterns: Sénéchal took intermediate sprint points specifically to deny Philipsen's green jersey rivals, revealing Deceuninck lead-out tactical flexibility.
Technical finale with 13.5km caused peloton compression that boxed out favorites, suggesting late positioning beats pure speed here.
Démare's Groupama-FDJ bossed finale positioning but Jacobsen screened behind him to steal win, exposing French team's awareness gap.

rider_signals.JACOBSEN Fabio: positive: Beat top sprinters including Démare and Philipsen using superior late positioning awareness after long injury recovery
rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: negative: Boxed out in technical finale despite green jersey and favorite status, suggesting positioning discipline weakness under pressure
rider_signals.DÉMARE Arnaud: negative: Led finale with Groupama-FDJ dominance but failed to check for screened riders, losing after controlling approach
rider_signals.TARAMAE Rein: neutral: Crashed inside 3km but retained red via time rule, no tactical signal
